conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Emily and I'm a Sales Development Representative at DeepData AI. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing with customer data platforms. I'd love to introduce you to our solution, which helps streamline data processing and improve match rates.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We're actually using a combination of tools right now, but I'm always open to exploring new options. What makes DeepData AI unique, and how does it compare to what we're currently using?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Great question. Our AI-powered solution is designed to handle large volumes of customer data, providing faster time-to-value and more accurate match rates. We've seen significant improvements in campaign effectiveness for our clients, and I think we could do the same for you. Would you be open to a demo to see how it works?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm intrigued, but we've recently implemented a new CDP, Zeotap, and we're still in the process of onboarding. I'm not sure if we're ready to add another tool to the mix. How does DeepData AI integrate with existing CDPs, and what kind of support do you offer for implementation?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: We've had success integrating with various CDPs, including Zeotap. Our team provides comprehensive support for onboarding, and we offer flexible deployment options to fit your needs. I'd be happy to discuss pricing and answer any questions you may have. We typically see a significant ROI for our clients, and I think we could make a strong case for your business.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I have to say that budget is a concern for us right now. We've already invested heavily in our current CDP, and I'm not sure if we can justify the additional expense. Can you give me a rough idea of what the pricing looks like for DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing varies depending on the scope of the project, but we typically start at around $50,000 per year. We also offer customized plans for larger enterprises. I understand that budget can be a concern, but I believe our solution could bring significant value to your business in the long run.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your honesty, Emily, but I'm afraid the price is just too high for us. We're looking for more cost-effective solutions that can integrate seamlessly with our existing infrastructure. I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for now. Thank you for reaching out, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should be prepared to address budget concerns earlier in the conversation and offer more flexible pricing options or tiered plans to accommodate smaller or cost-sensitive businesses. Sentiment: Neutral
